channel.title: Posts on Ed.
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ed.

item.title: Thirty Six
item.author: contact@serghei.pl (Serghei Iakovlev)
item.description:
Thirty-Six

Today I stand where circles meet, Where numbered years and heartbeats greet; Not merely older—more aware, Of hidden patterns everywhere.

For life first learned to write in three, Its secret script of destiny; Each tiny codon, softly spun, A whispered verse: Become. Be one.

And from the humble number six Rose carbon’s quiet, ancient bricks; Six steadfast sparks in every flame, The dust of stars from which we came.
